sys_script_client.description: 2.8 | 2022-05-10 | raj | STRY0119573 - Task Form View- Quick Task: Standard 2.8 | 2022-07-24 | raj | DFCT0011036 "Change View to Quick Task Form" or "Change view to Advanced Task Form" does NOT change the Task Form View
sys_script_client.name: Task - onLoad - Simple Task View
